flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Eastern Oklahoma County Technology Center are 46% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($49.3k vs $33.7k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Eastern Oklahoma County Technology Center rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (72.2% → 85.7%).
